<a name="NativeCallHandler"></a>
## type NativeCallHandler

NativeCallHandler is an interface that Java can implement to handle calls from Go. Defining it here ensures gomobile generates it in the 'sweetjuice' Java package.

```go
type NativeCallHandler interface {
    OnNativeCall(method string, args string) string
}
```
